zh.lifeSummary: 當William Foliot於1390年出生在英國武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆時，他的父親Sir. William Folliot I26歲，母親Katherine Greets21歲。他和Isabel Berkeley至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Foliot was born in 1390, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, his father, Sir. William Folliot I, was 26 and his mother, Katherine Greets, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Isabel Berkeley. He died in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Foliotが1390年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで生まれた時，父Sir. William Folliot Iは26歳，母Katherine Greetsは21歳であった。彼はIsabel Berkeleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Foliot(이)가 1390년 영국 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir. William Folliot I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Greets(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Isabel Berkeley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.
